recommendations.title: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
recommendations.overview: A giant alligator goes head to head with a giant Anaconda. The town sheriff must find a way to destroy the two monsters before they kill the whole town.

recommendations.title: The Seventh Sign
recommendations.overview: Abby is a pregnant woman with a curious new boarder in the apartment over her garage. Turns out he's heaven-sent and is speeding along the Apocalypse by bloodying rivers, egging on plagues and following scripture word for word.

recommendations.title: Population 436
recommendations.overview: A census-taker is sent to investigate why a certain small town has had the same population -- 436 residents -- for the last 100 years.

recommendations.title: Those Who Wish Me Dead
recommendations.overview: A young boy finds himself pursued by two assassins in the Montana wilderness, with a survival expert determined to protect him, and a forest fire threatening to consume them all.

recommendations.title: Cut Off
recommendations.overview: A coroner finds a capsule in the head of a heavily mutilated corpse, containing a phone number and single word: the name of his daughter.

recommendations.title: The Babadook
recommendations.overview: A grieving single mother and her child fall into a deep well of paranoia when an eerie children's book manifests in their home.

recommendations.title: Backcountry
recommendations.overview: A couple on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bear's territory.

recommendations.title: The Closet
recommendations.overview: After moving into a new house, a young girl begins displaying strange and disturbing behavior until, one day, she disappears behind a closet. While the devastated father is left with no clue about his daughter's disappearance, an exorcist shows up to

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Hunted
recommendations.overview: A woman flees two serial killers who are hot on her heels in a forest.
